barbering.name: Classic Haircut
barbering.description: Precision men's haircuts including fades, taper fades, skin fades, crew cuts, and lineups. Our Gig Harbor barbers tailor every cut to your face shape, hair texture, and personal style.

barbering.name: Beard Trim
barbering.description: Professional beard shaping, trimming, and grooming. From full beards to precise neckline and cheek line detailing.

barbering.name: Hot Towel Straight Razor Shave
barbering.description: A traditional straight razor shave with hot towel treatment for the closest, most comfortable shave. The classic barbershop luxury.

barbering.name: Style Change
barbering.description: Complete style consultations and transformations — from modern crops and textured styles to classic pompadours and slickbacks.

salon.name: Haircut
salon.description: Expert cuts and styling for all hair lengths and textures. Whether you want a precision bob, layered cut, or a fresh trim, our Gig Harbor stylists deliver.

salon.name: Color Services
salon.description: Full-spectrum color including balayage, highlights, lowlights, vivid color, root touch-ups, and color correction. Customized formulations for vibrant, long-lasting results.

salon.name: Blowout
salon.description: Professional blowouts and styling for smooth, voluminous, salon-quality results. Perfect for a polished everyday look or a special occasion refresh.

salon.name: Formal Style
salon.description: Special occasion styling including updos, bridal hair, and formal event looks. Designed to hold beautifully through the celebration.
